name: Amaretto Caramel Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F (120°C).
2. Arrange popcorn on two jelly roll pans; sprinkle almonds over the popcorn.
3. In a small saucepan, melt margarine over low heat. Stir in brown sugar and amaretto.
4. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally. Boil for 3 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and pour over popcorn. Toss until thoroughly coated.
6. Bake at 200°F (90°C) for 1 hour. Spread on foil or wax paper to cool.
7. Store in a loosely covered container.
